moments.title: World Cup Knockouts Begin
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout stages officially kick off with the Round of 32 starting June 28, following the group stages hosted across North America.

angles.name: Knockout Excitement
angles.copy: It's do-or-die time! The FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout rounds are here, with the Round of 32 kicking off this weekend. Who are you backing for glory?

angles.name: Global Football Fever
angles.copy: From group stage thrills to knockout drama! The World Cup is heating up, with teams battling it out in the Round of 32. Catch all the action.

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships Begin
moments.blurb: The prestigious Wimbledon Championships 2026 commence on Monday, June 29, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Tennis Grand Slam
angles.copy: Get ready for strawberries and cream! Wimbledon 2026 serves up its first matches on Monday. Who will claim the grass court crown this year?

angles.name: London's Iconic Tournament
angles.copy: The eyes of the tennis world turn to London! Wimbledon 2026 is almost here, bringing two weeks of grand slam action to the capital. Are you ready?

moments.title: Wimbledon in Central Park
moments.blurb: As a pre-Wimbledon event, 'The Wimbledon Court in Central Park' offers public play on a temporary grass court in New York City on June 27 and 28.

angles.name: Grass Court Experience
angles.copy: Ever dreamed of playing on a Wimbledon court? Today and tomorrow, a temporary grass court is open to the public in NYC's Central Park!

angles.name: Global Wimbledon Buzz
angles.copy: Wimbledon's bringing the grass court magic to Central Park today and tomorrow for a special public event ahead of the championships!

moments.title: Love Island Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island, hosted by Maya Jama, continues to air on ITV2, with a new batch of Islanders searching for romance in Mallorca.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: More drama, more romance, more Maya! Love Island series 13 is still bringing the heat from Mallorca. Who's your favourite couple (or chaos agent)?

angles.name: Summer TV Fix
angles.copy: Your summer TV fix is still going strong! Love Island continues on ITV2, keeping us hooked on all the villa antics.

moments.title: Clarkson's Farm Season 5
moments.blurb: Jeremy Clarkson's hit reality series, Clarkson's Farm, continues its fifth season on Prime Video, with the final episodes 7 and 8 released on June 17.

angles.name: Farm Life Unfiltered
angles.copy: Still catching up on the Diddly Squat drama? Clarkson's Farm Season 5 is available to stream on Prime Video – expect more chaos from Jeremy and Kaleb!

angles.name: Bingeworthy Series
angles.copy: If you need a good binge, Clarkson's Farm Season 5 is all out on Prime Video. Grab the popcorn and enjoy the rural antics!

moments.title: House of the Dragon Season 3
moments.blurb: Season 3 of the Game of Thrones prequel, House of the Dragon, which premiered on June 22, continues on HBO Max/Sky, with the Targaryen civil war reaching a climax.

angles.name: Dragonfire Drama
angles.copy: The Dance of the Dragons rages on! House of the Dragon Season 3 is delivering high stakes and epic battles on HBO Max/Sky. Who's on the Iron Throne in your house?

angles.name: Fantasy Must-Watch
angles.copy: Still obsessed with Westeros? House of the Dragon Season 3 is a fantasy must-watch, with the civil war reaching its peak.

moments.title: Happy Birthday H.E.R.
moments.blurb: Grammy and Oscar-winning R&B singer, songwriter, and multi-instrumentalist H.E.R. (Gabriella Sarmiento Wilson) turns 29 today.

angles.name: R&B Star's Day
angles.copy: Big birthday shout out to the incredibly talented H.E.R., who turns 29 today! What's your favourite track from the R&B sensation?

angles.name: Celebrating H.E.R.
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 29th birthday to the soulful voice of H.E.R. Her music always hits different!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Bruce Johnston
moments.blurb: Bruce Johnston, singer, songwriter, and long-time member of The Beach Boys, celebrates his 84th birthday today.

angles.name: Beach Boys Legend
angles.copy: Sending sunshine and good vibrations to Bruce Johnston of The Beach Boys, who turns 84 today! What's your favourite Beach Boys classic?

angles.name: Music Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 84th birthday to the legendary Bruce Johnston! Still making waves with The Beach Boys' timeless sound.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Nicole Scherzinger
moments.blurb: Singer, TV personality, and former lead Pussycat Doll, Nicole Scherzinger, will celebrate her 48th birthday on June 29.

angles.name: Pussycat Doll's Day
angles.copy: Getting ready to celebrate Nicole Scherzinger's 48th birthday on Monday! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls hit?

angles.name: 00s Pop Icon
angles.copy: Monday marks 48 years for Nicole Scherzinger! From 'Don't Cha' to her solo hits, she's a true 00s icon.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ian Paice
moments.blurb: Ian Paice, the legendary drummer and only constant member of rock band Deep Purple, will turn 78 on June 29.

angles.name: Rock Drummer Legend
angles.copy: Deep Purple's powerhouse drummer, Ian Paice, celebrates his 78th birthday on Monday! What's your favourite Deep Purple track?

angles.name: 70s Rock Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 78th birthday to the incredible Ian Paice of Deep Purple this Monday. Still rocking after all these years!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Evelyn 'Champagne' King
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning disco and R&B singer Evelyn 'Champagne' King, known for hits like 'Shame' and 'Love Come Down', will be 66 on June 29.

angles.name: Disco Queen's Day
angles.copy: Get ready to boogie! The legendary Evelyn 'Champagne' King turns 66 on Monday. What's your favourite track to get down to?

angles.name: R&B Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 66th birthday to the incredible Evelyn 'Champagne' King this Monday! Her voice is pure gold.

moments.title: New Heatwave Forecast for UK
moments.blurb: After a brief respite, parts of the UK are forecast to experience another heatwave with temperatures potentially reaching 30C+ around July 10-11.

angles.name: Summer Scorcher Returns
angles.copy: Just when you thought it was cooling down... another heatwave is forecast for the UK around July 10-11, with temperatures possibly hitting 30C+! Get those fans ready.

angles.name: July Forecast
angles.copy: The Met Office is hinting at more settled, drier and potentially very hot conditions for mid-July. Is your BBQ ready for another round of sunshine?

moments.title: School Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: School summer holidays begin this week for students in Wales (July 1) and Northern Ireland (July 1), with England following later in July.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: Freedom! For many across Wales and Northern Ireland, school's out for summer this week! What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Welsh School Break
angles.copy: Summer holidays begin this week for schools across Wales! Wishing all students a fantastic break. What adventures are you heading on?

moments.title: BST Hyde Park Continues
moments.blurb: American Express presents BST Hyde Park, a major summer music festival in London, is ongoing from June 26 to July 12, featuring global headline artists.

angles.name: Hyde Park Live
angles.copy: The music continues in Hyde Park! BST is still bringing massive artists to London. Who have you seen or who are you excited for?

angles.name: Summer Festival Vibes
angles.copy: London's Hyde Park is alive with music! BST Hyde Park is in full swing, delivering those essential summer festival vibes.

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival
moments.blurb: The Blenheim Palace Festival, a five-day celebration of music and arts, is currently running from June 27 to July 1 in Oxfordshire.

angles.name: Palace Party
angles.copy: Music and arts in a stunning setting! The Blenheim Palace Festival is ongoing until July 1st. What a backdrop for a summer event!

angles.name: Oxfordshire Festival
angles.copy: If you're near Oxfordshire, the Blenheim Palace Festival is offering a fantastic mix of music and arts until Wednesday. Get down there!

moments.title: Love Supreme Festival
moments.blurb: The Love Supreme Jazz Festival, a major jazz, funk, and soul event, takes place from July 3-5, 2026.

angles.name: Jazz, Funk & Soul Weekend
angles.copy: Get ready for a soulful weekend! Love Supreme Festival kicks off next Friday (July 3-5). Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is on to the Love Supreme Festival, starting next Friday! Three days of incredible jazz, funk, and soul music await.

moments.title: Maverick Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Maverick Festival, the UK's original Americana festival featuring roots music, dance, and workshops, runs from July 3-5, 2026.

angles.name: Americana Weekend
angles.copy: Dust off your cowboy boots! The Maverick Festival, celebrating Americana and roots music, starts next Friday (July 3-5). Who's joining the hoedown?

angles.name: Roots Music Vibes
angles.copy: Looking for some authentic roots music? Maverick Festival is on next weekend, bringing the best of Americana to the UK!

moments.title: Big Love Festival in South Wales
moments.blurb: The Big Love Festival, a 4-day music and arts festival, is set to celebrate its 10th year in the Welsh countryside this July.

angles.name: Welsh Festival Fun
angles.copy: South Wales, get ready! Big Love Festival is celebrating its 10th year this July with 4 days of music, arts and good vibes in the countryside!

angles.name: Music in the Valleys
angles.copy: Big Love Festival is back for its 10th year in the Welsh countryside this July! Who's joining the party?

moments.title: Supergirl Movie in Cinemas
moments.blurb: The new DC movie 'Supergirl', starring Milly Alcock as Kara Zor-El, was released in UK cinemas on June 25.

angles.name: New DC Heroine
angles.copy: Milly Alcock takes flight as Supergirl! The new DC movie is in cinemas now – have you seen it yet?

angles.name: Superhero Blockbuster
angles.copy: Your next superhero fix is here! Supergirl landed in cinemas this week. Grab your tickets and enjoy the action!

moments.title: Minions & Monsters Release
moments.blurb: Universal's new animated film 'Minions & Monsters' is set to be released in UK cinemas on July 3.

angles.name: Family Film Fun
angles.copy: Get ready for some animated chaos! 'Minions & Monsters' arrives in UK cinemas next Friday, July 3. Perfect for the school holidays!

angles.name: New Cinema Release
angles.copy: The Minions are back with monsters! Catch 'Minions & Monsters' in cinemas from July 3rd for some family-friendly fun.
